creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port has been updated (and it is not necessary to send-pr me about 
that as dozens and dozens of updates witness). 

Tracking the Wine development and "stable" branches separately is a 
good suggestion and I will likely start doing so once Wine has become 
a bit more mature.  Right now, 1.0.x really lacks many, many enhancements 
and is really more inactive than stable and 1.1.x sees lots of worthwhile 
improvements with just that one regression affecting FreeBSD in the last 
year, but I can see the situation changing in 2009.
